UpdateSubnet.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateSubnet.subnetId: ID of the subnet instance to be updated
UpdateSubnet.name: Subnet name. Cannot be "default". Up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores
UpdateSubnet.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 CIDR block. true to enable, false to disable
